children.name: Product defects
The activation request must contain a validly formatted fiscal code
Querying activation status with an invalid payerId format returns 400

AssertionError: assert 201 == 400
 +  where 201 = <Response [201]>.status_code
Cannot send RTP with an amount over the POSTE limit
Cannot send RTP with expired date
AssertionError: Error activating debtor
Cancelling an RTP - EPC v4 mock happy path scenario: empty_json_object
parameters: 'No `Sts.Conf` confirmation is present (empty JSON object), so only CANCEL_RTP is triggered and the RTP stays in RFC_SENT.'

children.name: Cancelling an RTP - EPC v4 mock happy path scenario: plain_string
parameters: 'The response body is not a recognizable cancellation confirmation (quoted plain string), so the RTP stays in RFC_SENT.'

children.name: Cancelling an RTP - EPC v4 mock happy path scenario: minimal_json
parameters: 'No `Sts.Conf` confirmation is present (minimal JSON without Sts), so only CANCEL_RTP is triggered and the RTP stays in RFC_SENT.'

children.name: Cancelling an RTP - EPC v4 mock happy path scenario: cncl_confirmed
parameters: '`Sts.Conf = "CNCL"` triggers CANCEL_RTP -> CONFIRM_RFC -> CANCEL_RTP_ACCR, ending in CANCELLED_ACCR.'

children.name: Cancelling an RTP - EPC v4 mock happy path scenario: no_sts_block
parameters: 'No `Sts.Conf` confirmation is present (Sts block omitted entirely), so only CANCEL_RTP is triggered and the RTP stays in RFC_SENT.'

children.name: Cancelling an RTP - EPC v4 mock happy path scenario: rjcr_rejected
parameters: '`Sts.Conf = "RJCR"` triggers CANCEL_RTP -> CONFIRM_RFC -> CANCEL_RTP_REJECTED, ending in CANCELLED_REJECTED.'

children.name: Cancelling an RTP - EPC v4 mock happy path scenario: no_match_fallback
parameters: 'The mock policy falls back to its default `{}` response when no notice number matches, so the RTP stays in RFC_SENT.'

children.name: Cancelling an RTP - EPC v4 mock unhappy path scenario: epc_400
parameters: 'The PSP synchronously rejects the cancellation request with 422 (per standard behaviour for the EPC 400 Bad Request scenario). The RTP then transitions to ERROR_CANCEL via ERROR_CANCEL_RTP.'

children.name: Cancelling an RTP - EPC v4 mock unhappy path scenario: epc_401
parameters: 'The PSP synchronously rejects the cancellation request with 422 (per standard behaviour for the EPC 401 Unauthorized scenario). The RTP then transitions to ERROR_CANCEL via ERROR_CANCEL_RTP.'

children.name: Cancelling an RTP - EPC v4 mock unhappy path scenario: epc_404
parameters: 'The PSP synchronously rejects the cancellation request with 422 (per standard behaviour for the EPC 404 Not Found scenario). The RTP then transitions to ERROR_CANCEL via ERROR_CANCEL_RTP.'

children.name: Cancelling an RTP - EPC v4 mock unhappy path scenario: epc_406
parameters: 'The PSP synchronously rejects the cancellation request with 422 (per standard behaviour for the EPC 406 Not Acceptable scenario). The RTP then transitions to ERROR_CANCEL via ERROR_CANCEL_RTP.'

children.name: Cancelling an RTP - EPC v4 mock unhappy path scenario: epc_410
parameters: 'The PSP synchronously rejects the cancellation request with 422 (per standard behaviour for the EPC 410 Gone scenario). The RTP then transitions to ERROR_CANCEL via ERROR_CANCEL_RTP.'

children.name: Cancelling an RTP - EPC v4 mock unhappy path scenario: epc_415
parameters: 'The PSP synchronously rejects the cancellation request with 422 (per standard behaviour for the EPC 415 Unsupported Media Type scenario). The RTP then transitions to ERROR_CANCEL via ERROR_CANCEL_RTP.'

children.name: Cancelling an RTP - EPC v4 mock unhappy path scenario: epc_422
parameters: 'The PSP synchronously rejects the cancellation request with 422 (per standard behaviour for the EPC 422 Unprocessable Entity scenario). The RTP then transitions to ERROR_CANCEL via ERROR_CANCEL_RTP.'

children.name: Cancelling an RTP - EPC v4 mock unhappy path scenario: epc_429
parameters: 'The PSP synchronously rejects the cancellation request with 422 (per standard behaviour for the EPC 429 Too Many Requests scenario). The RTP then transitions to ERROR_CANCEL via ERROR_CANCEL_RTP.'

children.name: Cancelling an RTP - EPC v4 mock unhappy path scenario: cncl_extra_field
parameters: 'An EPC response containing fields not declared in the OpenAPI spec is treated as an invalid message and is NOT tolerated for accept/reject purposes (confirmed with rtp-sender-v2 maintainers, PR #26). The extra `invalid-field` property invalidates the whole response, so the CNCL confirmation is not processed and the RTP stays in RFC_SENT.'

children.name: Cancelling an RTP - EPC v4 mock unhappy path scenario: rjcr_extra_field
parameters: 'An EPC response containing fields not declared in the OpenAPI spec is treated as an invalid message and is NOT tolerated for accept/reject purposes (confirmed with rtp-sender-v2 maintainers, PR #26). The extra `invalid-field` property invalidates the whole response, so the RJCR confirmation is not processed and the RTP stays in RFC_SENT.'

children.name: Cancelling an RTP - EPC v4 mock unhappy path scenario: malformed_string
parameters: 'The response cannot be parsed as a cancellation confirmation (malformed, unquoted string), so the RTP stays in RFC_SENT rather than erroring out.'

An RTP sent with synchronous rejection containing extra fields results in status REJECTED - through Web API V2
An RTP sent with synchronous rejection and missing _links results in status REJECTED - through Web API V2
